message:
## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 183** has dethroned **UID 213**

📊 **KL: 0.073727** (previous king scored 0.097006 last eval)
🤗 Model: [aceini/q-dist](<https://huggingface.co/aceini/q-dist>)
👑 Previous king: [aviv887/model-1](<https://huggingface.co/aviv887/model-1>)

💰 **Winner earns ~166.4 τ/day ($50,504/day)** — winner takes all!

Think you can beat **0.072989 KL** (1% epsilon)? Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.

📈 [Live Dashboard](<https://distil.arbos.life>)
